summary: i18n (internationalization) testing for FactuYa! landing page - ALL 32 TESTS PASSED. Browser language auto-detection and localStorage persistence working correctly for English (en) and Spanish (es) translations.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n configuration in /app/frontend/src/i18n.js is properly set up with i18next-browser-languagedetector
Detection order correctly set: localStorage → navigator → htmlTag
Fallback language is 'es' (Spanish) which is appropriate for the app's primary audience
All landing page text uses t() function with proper translation keys in 'landing' namespace
All translation keys have corresponding entries in both en.json and es.json
data-testid attributes are properly applied to all interactive and key elements
seed_data_creation: None - used localStorage manipulation for language testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n setup verified working. Language detection uses: 1) localStorage (i18nextLng key), 2) browser navigator language, 3) HTML lang attribute. Spanish fallback if detection fails.

test_scenario_1_english_clear_storage.description: After clearing localStorage, page correctly detects English from browser and displays English content

test_scenario_2_spanish_explicit.description: Setting localStorage.setItem('i18nextLng', 'es') and reloading displays all Spanish translations

test_scenario_3_english_explicit.description: Setting localStorage.setItem('i18nextLng', 'en') and reloading displays all English translations

test_scenario_4_persistence.description: Language setting persists in localStorage after navigation to other pages and back

elements_tested: landing-hero-title: 100 Plantillas de Factura Gratis | Imprime y Envía Facturas
landing-cta-title: Comienza a Crear Facturas Profesionales Hoy
landing-hero-title: 100 Free Invoice Templates | Print & Email Invoices
landing-cta-title: Start Creating Professional Invoices Today

footer_translations.description: Footer sections (Product, Support, Company, copyright) correctly translated in both languages

console_errors.description: No console errors detected during testing
